parts.text: Hello, my name is Alex Smith. I'd like to book an in-branch meeting about a mortgage. I'm looking for something around 4pm, best not Monday.

Hello Alex! I can help you book an in-branch meeting about a mortgage.

Let me just check the available topics and contact methods.
Great, 'Mortgage' is an available topic. Now let me check the available contact mediums for mortgage appointments.

Okay, 'Branch Meeting' is available for mortgage appointments.

You mentioned you'd prefer not to have the meeting on Monday, and around 4 PM. Since today is Sunday, I'll look for available slots starting from Tuesday, June 2nd.

Let me check for availability on Tuesday, June 2nd, between 3 PM and 5 PM.

I couldn't find any availability on Tuesday, June 2nd, between 3 PM and 5 PM.

Let me check for availability for the entire day on Tuesday, June 2nd, and also include Wednesday, June 3rd, and Thursday, June 4th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

It seems there are no available slots for Tuesday, June 2nd, Wednesday, June 3rd, or Thursday, June 4th.

Let me expand the search to Friday, June 5th, and Monday, June 8th, focusing on the afternoon, around your preferred 4 PM.

I'll start by checking Friday, June 5th, from 2 PM to 5 PM.

I'm still not finding any available slots for you on Friday afternoon.

Let's look at the following week. I'll check for availability on Monday, June 8th (keeping in mind your preference), Tuesday, June 9th, and Wednesday, June 10th, from 2 PM to 5 PM.

I'm having trouble finding a slot around 4 PM in the coming days. Let's broaden our search.

I will check for full-day availability (9 AM to 5 PM) on Thursday, June 11th, and Friday, June 12th.

Starting with Thursday, June 11th:
Still no luck for Thursday. Let me check Friday, June 12th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

Still no availability on Friday. It seems like in-branch mortgage appointments are quite booked up.

Let's try the following week: Monday, June 15th, Tuesday, June 16th, and Wednesday, June 17th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

It seems we're having trouble finding an in-branch mortgage appointment for you in the coming days.

Let me check for Thursday, June 18th, and Friday, June 19th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still unable to find any in-branch mortgage appointments for you in the coming weeks.

Let me check the week of June 22nd. I will look for availability on Monday, June 22nd, Tuesday, June 23rd, and Wednesday, June 24th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still not finding any in-branch mortgage appointments for you in the week of June 22nd.

Let's try looking at Thursday, June 25th, Friday, June 26th, and Monday, June 29th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still having difficulty finding an in-branch mortgage appointment for you in June.

Let's look into the first week of July. I will check for availability on Wednesday, July 1st, Thursday, July 2nd, and Friday, July 3rd, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still unable to find any in-branch mortgage appointments in early July. It appears there's very limited availability for this type of meeting.

Would you be open to an online meeting, as there might be more options available?

In the meantime, I will continue to search for in-branch appointments for you. Let's check the week of July 6th: Monday, July 6th, Tuesday, July 7th, and Wednesday, July 8th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm really struggling to find any in-branch mortgage appointments for you in the coming weeks. It seems there's extremely limited availability.

Would you be open to an **online meeting** instead? There's usually more flexibility and availability for those.

I'd really prefer an in-branch meeting, even if it means waiting a bit longer. Could you please check for any in-branch availability around that 4pm time slot on Tuesday, June 2nd, even if it's not exactly 4pm?

I understand you'd prefer an in-branch meeting, Alex, and I appreciate your patience.

I did check for availability on Tuesday, June 2nd, both around 4 PM and for the entire day (from 9 AM to 5 PM), and unfortunately, there were no in-branch mortgage appointments available on that day.

It seems that in-branch mortgage appointments are very heavily booked. I've already searched quite far out into June and early July without success for in-branch options.

Would you be open to considering an online meeting? This would likely give us many more options and much sooner availability.

I'd still really prefer an in-branch meeting. Could you check for anything in the first week of June, specifically Wednesday the 3rd or Thursday the 4th, around 4pm? I'm flexible by an hour either way.

I understand your preference for an in-branch meeting, Alex.

I previously checked for in-branch mortgage appointments for the full days of Tuesday, June 2nd, Wednesday, June 3rd, and Thursday, June 4th (from 9 AM to 5 PM), and unfortunately, there were no available slots during that period, including around your preferred 4 PM.

It seems that in-branch mortgage appointments are extremely limited in the near future. Would you be willing to consider an online meeting, which generally has much more availability? Or would you like me to continue searching for in-branch appointments further out in time?

Okay, I understand. Please continue to search for in-branch appointments further out. Could you check for anything in the second week of June, specifically Monday the 8th or Tuesday the 9th, again around 4pm?

I understand, Alex. I will continue to look for in-branch appointments for you.

It appears that in-branch mortgage appointments are extremely limited. I understand your surprise, Alex, and I appreciate your persistence.

You're right, Alex, this is proving to be quite challenging! I appreciate your patience as we search for a suitable time.

It seems that even online mortgage appointments are in very high demand. Would you like me to broaden the search to include more flexible times on those days, or perhaps look further out into the second week of June or even later?

I've checked for online mortgage appointments around 4 PM (from 3 PM to 5 PM) on Wednesday, June 10th, and unfortunately, there are no available slots during that specific time.

Since you're willing to take the earliest possible online appointment, I will now search for that. I'll start looking from tomorrow, Monday, June 1st, for full-day availability (9 AM to 5 PM), and continue searching until I find an open slot.

Let me check for availability on Monday, June 1st, Tuesday, June 2nd, and Wednesday, June 3rd.

I'm still not finding any online mortgage appointments for the first few days of June.

Let me continue checking for the earliest possible slot. I will now look at Thursday, June 4th, Friday, June 5th, and Saturday, June 6th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

Still no online mortgage appointments available for Thursday, June 4th, Friday, June 5th, or Saturday, June 6th.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check the following week: Monday, June 8th, Tuesday, June 9th, and Wednesday, June 10th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

Still no online mortgage appointments for Monday, June 8th, Tuesday, June 9th, or Wednesday, June 10th.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check Thursday, June 11th, Friday, June 12th, and Saturday, June 13th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still not finding any online mortgage appointments for Thursday, June 11th, Friday, June 12th, or Saturday, June 13th.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check the following week: Monday, June 15th, Tuesday, June 16th, and Wednesday, June 17th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

Still no online mortgage appointments for Monday, June 15th, Tuesday, June 16th, or Wednesday, June 17th.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check Thursday, June 18th, Friday, June 19th, and Saturday, June 20th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still not finding any online mortgage appointments for Thursday, June 18th, Friday, June 19th, or Saturday, June 20th.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check the following week: Monday, June 22nd, Tuesday, June 23rd, and Wednesday, June 24th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still not finding any online mortgage appointments for Monday, June 22nd, Tuesday, June 23rd, or Wednesday, June 24th.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check Thursday, June 25th, Friday, June 26th, and Saturday, June 27th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I'm still not finding any online mortgage appointments for Thursday, June 25th, Friday, June 26th, or Saturday, June 27th. This is highly unusual.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible slot. Let me check the following week: Monday, June 29th, Tuesday, June 30th, and Wednesday, July 1st, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I am still unable to find any online mortgage appointments for Monday, June 29th, Tuesday, June 30th, or Wednesday, July 1st.

Given the persistent lack of availability for both in-branch and online mortgage appointments, it seems there might be an issue with the scheduling system or an unprecedented demand for mortgage consultations.

I will continue searching for the earliest possible online appointment. Let me check Thursday, July 2nd, Friday, July 3rd, and Saturday, July 4th, from 9 AM to 5 PM.

I am still unable to find any online mortgage appointments for Thursday, July 2nd, Friday, July 3rd, or Saturday, July 4th.

This is very unusual, Alex. It appears there are no online mortgage appointments available for the next several weeks.

I apologize for this difficulty. It seems the system is not returning any available slots for online mortgage consultations at this time. I recommend trying again in a day or two, as new slots may open up.

Would you like me to check for any other type of appointment, or perhaps for mortgage appointments at a later date, say, in mid-July or August, in case there's a system refresh or new availability comes up?

That's truly surprising and frustrating. Given the situation, I'll take your advice and try again in a day or two. There's no point in booking something that far out without certainty. Thank you for your efforts.

I completely understand your frustration, Alex. I'm very sorry that we couldn't find an available in-branch or online mortgage appointment for you today. It is indeed quite surprising.

Please do try again in a day or two, and I'll be here to assist you then. I hope we'll have better luck finding a suitable slot for your mortgage consultation.
Thank you. I will do that.

justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences, even when the user was flexible around a specific time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering concrete alternative dates or times, instead asking the user to provide new preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls for both in-branch and online appointments, checking the same dates and times repeatedly.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments and its repetitive responses, leading to a dead-end conversation.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent struggled significantly with finding any available appointments, both in-branch and online, which led to a very unproductive and frustrating conversation for the user.
